function Min(a: int, b: int): int {\n  if a <= b then a else b\n}\n\nghost function Max(a: int, b: int): int {\n  if a >= b then a else b\n}\n\nghost predicate Divides(d: int, n: int)\n  requires d > 0\n{\n  n % d == 0\n}\n\nghost predicate IsGcd(g: int, a: int, b: int)\n  requires a > 0 && b > 0 && g > 0\n{\n  Divides(g, a) && Divides(g, b) &&\n  forall d :: 1 <= d <= Min(a, b) ==> (Divides(d, a) && Divides(d, b)) ==> d <= g\n}\n\nghost predicate IsLcm(l: int, a: int, b: int)\n  requires a > 0 && b > 0 && l > 0\n{\n  Divides(a, l) && Divides(b, l) &&\n  forall m :: 1 <= m <= l ==> (Divides(a, m) && Divides(b, m)) ==> l <= m\n}\n\nghost predicate ValidSolution(a: int, b: int, x: int)\n{\n  a > 0 && b > 0 && x > 0 &&\n  exists g | 1 <= g <= Min(a, b) ::\n    exists l | Max(a, b) <= l <= a * b ::\n      IsGcd(g, a, b) && IsLcm(l, a, b) && g + l == x\n}\n\nlemma DivModLemma(b: int, m: int)\n  requires b > 0\n  requires 1 <= m <= b\n  requires m % b == 0\n  ensures m == b\n{\n  var q := m / b;\n  assert m == q * b;\n  if q <= 0 {\n    assert m <= 0;\n  }\n  if q >= 2 {\n    assert m >= 2 * b;\n  }\n  assert q == 1;\n}\n\nmethod EhAbAndGcd(x: int) returns (a: int, b: int)\n  requires x >= 2\n  ensures ValidSolution(a, b, x)\n{\n  a := 1;\n  b := x - 1;\n\n  ghost var g := 1;\n  ghost var l := x - 1;\n\n  // GCD(1, x-1) = 1\n  assert Divides(g, a);\n  assert Divides(g, b);\n  assert IsGcd(g, a, b);\n\n  // LCM(1, x-1) = x-1\n  assert Divides(a, l);\n  assert Divides(b, l);\n\n  // For the LCM universally quantified part: if 1|m and (x-1)|m and 1<=m<=x-1, then m>=x-1\n  forall m | 1 <= m <= l && Divides(a, m) && Divides(b, m)\n    ensures l <= m\n  {\n    // b divides m means m % b == 0, and 1 <= m <= b, so m == b == l\n    DivModLemma(b, m);\n  }\n\n  assert IsLcm(l, a, b);\n  assert g + l == x;\n\n  // Provide witnesses for the existentials\n  assert 1 <= g <= Min(a, b);\n  assert Max(a, b) <= l <= a * b;\n  assert IsGcd(g, a, b) && IsLcm(l, a, b) && g + l == x;\n}\n"},"caller":{"type":"direct"}}],"stop_reason":null,"stop_sequence":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":2,"cache_creation_input_tokens":11339,"cache_read_input_tokens":8610,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":11339},"output_tokens":10,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"},"context_management":null},"parent_tool_use_id":null,"session_id":"1d69d554-603d-463c-b2a9-145c834f4343","uuid":"e941c9d2-2eb2-4205-b8bb-a0d65638bb96"},{"type":"rate_limit_event","rate_limit_info":{"status":"allowed","resetsAt":1773824400,"rateLimitType":"five_hour","overageStatus":"rejected","overageDisabledReason":"org_level_disabled","isUsingOverage":false},"uuid":"0b099f6c-70e6-4727-b77e-c5f76c96ae57","session_id":"1d69d554-603d-463c-b2a9-145c834f4343"},{"type":"user","message":{"role":"user","content":[{"tool_use_id":"toolu_01CA4TeZ43mNgPeK8QfipkRj","type":"tool_result","content":"File
